message:
fix(mcp): correct JSON-RPC 2.0 notification handling

Per JSON-RPC 2.0 spec, notifications (requests without an id) MUST NOT
receive a response. The `initialized` notification is now handled
correctly by returning None when no id is present.

- Changed handle_request to return Option<JsonRpcResponse>
- Modified handle_initialized to return None for notifications
- Added debug logging for notification handling

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
